title: Cosmetic-only change: whitespace and formatting
before_text:
## Create a Payment Intent

POST /v1/payment_intents

Creates a PaymentIntent object.

### Parameters

|  Parameter  |  Type  |  Required  |
|---|---|---|
|  amount  |  integer  |  Yes  |
|  currency  |  string  |  Yes  |
|  description  |  string  |  No  |
after_text:
